tool_args.label: Step 2: Corridor Selection and Concept Design - Winter 2014/2015

payload.event_name: Step 2: Corridor Selection and Concept Design
payload.description: Identify selected roadway(s) for SBS improvements and terminal locations. Develop concept design for selected locations to determine effects on transit travel time, traffic flow, safety, parking/delivery access. Solicit input from CAC and community members.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Step 2: Corridor Selection and Concept Design

payload.description: Detailed street design, prepare Traffic Analysis for SBS corridor, identify SBS stop locations, identify pedestrian safety improvements, refine details with CAC and general public
Finalize corridor design, develop Implementation plan, prepare construction phasing plan for capital elements if any, launch SBS service

tool_args.label: Community Advisory Committee (CAC) - Flushing to Jamaica SBS

payload.description: Composed of representatives from elected officials, community boards, community organizations, business representatives, major institutions. Role: to provide input and guidance during project design and implementation, to help relay important project information and updates to constituents and members.
Summer 2014: Traffic and parking data collection, transit operations data collection and analysis, develop routing concepts. Fall 2014: CAC Meeting #2.

evidence_refs.source_quote: Transit operations data collection and analysis
